[textmode.js](../../../../../index.md) / [conversion](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeConversionManager](../../TextmodeConversionManager.md) / has

# Method: has()

```ts
has(id): boolean;
```

Check if a conversion strategy with the given ID is registered.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `id` | `string` | The conversion strategy ID to check |

## Returns

`boolean`

true if the strategy exists
